name: Lucidya
description:
Built as an AI-powered listening tool, Lucidya will give you a clear picture of your presence. It even monitors online news, TV, and radio in addition to social media - so you can see what people are saying across mediums. While it doesn’t offer comprehensive management tools, it’s still a favorite for teams looking for a specialized listening tool. Here are the deets:

  • Lucidya focuses on social listening, scouring social media, online news, TV, and radio in real-time
  • Sign up for spike alerts to know when a topic is gaining rapid traction
  • A robust reporting feature makes it easy to share data
  • The multilingual dashboard means you can still monitor your non-English speaking audiences
  • Lucidya monitors TV, online news, radio, and socials, including Facebook, Instagram, and Twitter.

Key features:

✅ Social listening

✅ Spike alerts 

✅ Reporting
what_people_say:
What people say :

Lucidya is great for anyone looking for a specialized listening tool. Here’s what customers say:

“I like that Lucidya supports crisis management with real time alerts that indicate unexpected spikes in negative sentiment, which comes in handy for high-profile brands and government organizations.”

"Lucidya is a game-changer for social listening. Its AI-powered insights and real-time monitoring are incredibly valuable."
cta_heading: Synup Social excels with superior features and competitive price
what_it_s_lacking:
What it’s lacking:

  • 🚫 LinkedIn monitoring
  • 🚫 Posting
